## What you build

Product, domain, context.

## Your north star question

The one question your product must never violate.

## How many constraints?

How many hard constraints does your guardian have?

## What surprised you?

What failure mode did you encounter that you did not expect?

## Would you share your guardian structure?

No obligation. Many guardians contain operational details that should stay private.
Sharing the structure without the content is valuable too.
